allow: Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_NAME="TechCross" GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL="dev@techcross.ie" git add server.js .claude/settings.local.json ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md BUG_REPORT.md RISK_ANALYSIS.md SAFE_REFACTOR_PLAN.md FULL_CODEBASE_AUDIT.md)
Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_NAME=TechCross GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL=dev@techcross.ie GIT_COMMITTER_NAME=TechCross GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL=dev@techcross.ie git commit -m ' *)
Bash(GIT_AUTHOR_NAME="TechCross" GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL="dev@techcross.ie" GIT_COMMITTER_NAME="TechCross" GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL="dev@techcross.ie" git commit *)

PowerShell($data = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/pricing/google; Write-Host "models: $\($data.models.PSObject.Properties.Name.Count\)"; Write-Host "serviceTypes: $\($data.serviceTypes.PSObject.Properties.Name.Count\)"; Write-Host "has name property: $\($null -ne $data.name\)")

PowerShell($data = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/pricing/samsung; Write-Host "Top keys: $\($data.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)"; Write-Host "phone.models: $\($data.phone.models.PSObject.Properties.Name.Count\)"; Write-Host "tablet.models: $\($data.tablet.models.PSObject.Properties.Name.Count\)")
